person.name: Egidia Agnes Comyn
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary: Agnes Comyn, Countess of Strathearn was part of the plot by Sir William Soulis, her nephew, one of the unsuccessful claimants to the throne in 1292 who was to have been put on the throne if the plot to murder the Bruce had been successful. Seized shortly after the signing of the Letter of Arbroath in 1320, she was imprisoned for life along with Sir William.

zh.Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵
zh.lifeSummary: 當Egidia Agnes Comyn於1244年出生在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵時，她的父親Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland27歲，母親Elizabeth de Quincy24歲。她和Malise Strathearn Earl of Strathearn至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1320年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Egidia Agnes Comyn于1244年出生在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵时，她的父亲Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland27岁，母亲Elizabeth de Quincy24岁。她和Malise Strathearn Earl of Strathearn至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1320年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Comyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cumming
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): most probably a habitational name from Bosc-Benard-Commin in Eure, France. This place lies on the edge of the Forêt de Rouvray, near Rouen, in the heart of the district from which came numerous Domesday barons, and so is much more likely to be the source of the name than Comines in Nord. The name is also possibly derived from the personal name Cumin, which is found in Norfolk, Lincolnshire, and Yorkshire in the 12th and 13th centuries and may be of Breton origin, according to Reaney. Compare Old Breton Cunmin, which also appears as Cumin, and is from con- ‘hound’ with an uncertain second element, perhaps the min ‘edge’ which is found in other personal names.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cuimín (or Ó Cuimín) ‘son (or ‘descendant’) of Cuimín’, a personal name formed from a diminutive of cam ‘crooked’. There was a 7th-century abbot of Iona named Cumin. In Scotland, this Irish surname became confused with the Norman name.

History: A notable bearer of the Norman surname is Wilhelmus Comyn, Bishop of Durham, who came north to Scotland with King David I in 1124 and was appointed Chancellor of Scotland. He established his nephew Richard in Tynedale and Roxburghshire, and Richard also rose to be Chancellor of Scotland. The Comyn or Cumming family gained the earldoms of Buchan and Menteith and rose to be the most powerful noble family in Scotland in the century before the rise of King Robert Bruce.

nameMeanings.name: Egidia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Egidia Agnes Comyn was born in 1244, in Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland, was 27 and her mother, Elizabeth de Quincy, was 24. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Malise Strathearn Earl of Strathearn. She died after 1320.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Egidia Agnes Comyn est née en 1244, à Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Quincy, avait 24 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Malise Strathearn Earl of Strathearn. Elle est décédée après 1320.

de.lifeSummary: Als Egidia Agnes Comyn 1244 in Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland 27 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth de Quincy 24. Sie hatte mit Malise Strathearn Earl of Strathearn mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1320.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Egidia Agnes Comyn è nata il nel 1244 nel Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth de Quincy, aveva 24 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Malise Strathearn Earl of Strathearn. Morì dopo il 1320.

ja.lifeSummary: Egidia Agnes Comynが1244年にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアブチャンで生まれた時，父Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotlandは27歳，母Elizabeth de Quincyは24歳であった。彼女はMalise Strathearn Earl of Strathearnとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1320年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Egidia Agnes Comyn(이)가 1244년 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르 버챈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Quincy(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 Malise Strathearn Earl of Strathearn(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1320년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Egidia Agnes Comyn nasceu em 1244, em Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Quincy, tinha 24 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Malise Strathearn Earl of Strathearn. Ela faleceu após 1320.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Egidia Agnes Comyn родилась в 1244 г. в местности бучань, абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Quincy, 24. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Malise Strathearn Earl of Strathearn. Она умерла после 1320 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Egidia Agnes Comyn nació en 1244, en Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Quincy, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Malise Strathearn Earl of Strathearn. Murió después de 1320.
